source: User-forwarded email reply from Candy Falcon <santisrestaurantemexicano@gmail.com>, Sun, Apr 19, 10:22 AM, in response to a tree nut allergy inquiry. User confirmed this applies to all Santi's locations in this project (Meeting St, West Ashley, Mount Pleasant).
emailText:
Hi Joshua,

We do not use use any kind of tree nuts. We are nut free.

Regards,
Candy
